Registry / Terms / repeatability error

repeatability error

VIMOutdated — VIM 1993 G 18 #02079 · 9 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 1993 · concept #5.27view ↗

ability of a measuring instrument to provide closely similar indications for repeated applications of the same measurand under the same conditions of measurement

Outdated: Cites VIM 1993. Latest: VIM 2012.
  • VIM 1993 · #5.27
    ability of a measuring instrument to provide closely similar indications for repeated applications of the same measurand under the same conditions of measurement
  • VIM 2007 · #2.21
    *measurement precision* under a set of *repeatability conditions of measurement*

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIM 2012.
  2. MEDIUM 8 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

8 distinct definitions across 9 publications. 1 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).

2 identical202X2010
for the purposes of this Recommendation, the difference between the largest and the smallest results of successive measurements of the same quantity carried out under the same conditions
